hero.name: Cheick Issa
hero.subtitle: I transform your ideas into
hero.description: I design modern web experiences that merge technical development, intentional design and AI automation.

about.title: My Journey
about.subtitle: 3 years in textile design, then became an AI - Fullstack developer specialized in intelligent automation

paragraphs.intro: After 3 years in textile design, I discovered my true passion:
paragraphs.introEnd: This career change allowed me to transfer my creativity, aesthetic sense and attention to detail to creating high-impact digital experiences.
paragraphs.training: Trained through two intensive bootcamps at GoMyCode Rivera (Abidjan), I now combine fullstack technical skills and AI expertise to design modern, automated and intelligent web solutions. From design to deployment, I transform complex processes into smooth and efficient interfaces.

2024.title: The Click
2024.description: Career change after 3 years in textile design. First line of code, immediate passion.

2025.title: Intensive Training
2025.description: GoMyCode Rivera (Abidjan) Bootcamp: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Firebase. Certification obtained.

2026a.title: AI & Automation Specialization
2026a.description: Fullstack & AI Bootcamp at GoMyCode. AI Agents, N8N workflows, API integrations. Certification obtained.

2026b.title: AI - Fullstack Freelancer
2026b.description: Generative AI expertise, modern web development (Next.js, TypeScript), business process automation.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Modern technical stack combining fullstack development, artificial intelligence and automation

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Custom technical solutions combining modern web development, generative AI and intelligent automation

items.title: Showcase Websites & Landing Pages
items.description: Ultra-performant websites (Next.js 15, TypeScript) with smooth animations (Framer Motion), advanced SEO optimization and loading time < 2s. Responsive and accessible design (WCAG).

items.title: Fullstack Web Applications
items.description: React/Next.js apps with secure authentication (Firebase Auth), real-time databases (Firestore, Supabase), payment integrations (Stripe) and automated deployment.

items.title: Conversational AI Agents
items.description: Personalized AI assistants (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini) to automate customer service, content generation, data analysis. AI API integration and natural language processing.

items.title: Automation & N8N Workflows
items.description: Automation of complex business processes: N8N workflows, multi-API integrations, webhooks, custom triggers. Time savings and reduction of human errors.

items.title: UI/UX Design & Prototyping
items.description: Modern and intuitive interfaces designed on Figma. Consistent design systems (Shadcn/ui, DaisyUI, Tailwind), interactive prototypes and user testing.

items.title: Mobile Applications (APK)
items.description: Development of native and cross-platform Android applications (React Native). Smooth interface, performance optimization and backend services integration (Firebase, REST API).

projects.title: My
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects that demonstrate my skills in modern web development, from design to production.

items.title: Landkit
items.description: Modern and responsive landing page with smooth animations and premium design. Optimized for conversion and SEO.

items.title: FlowFund
items.description: Collaborative and secure online crowdfunding platform. Stripe payments, Firebase authentication and real-time dashboard.

items.title: Customer Service AI Agent
items.description: Intelligent conversational AI assistant for e-commerce. N8n integration, natural language processing and contextual responses.

items.title: Personal Portfolio
items.description: Modern developer portfolio with Next.js 15, Framer Motion animations and custom design system. Performance and SEO optimized.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: A question, a project or an opportunity? I would love to discuss it with you.
